working_on.task: Implemented full continuous reading cycle with 30-min loop, refresh, translate, and UI sync.
working_on.notes: Verified logic for UI sync, duplicate prevention, and long-press interaction.

pending_tasks.task: UI: Add Sync Indicator to main screen

recent_changes.description: Implemented Continuous Reading Mode (30-min loop). Added automated refresh, translation, and UI synchronization. Fixed 3 critical logic bugs in the flow.
Fixed 3 High and 4 Medium sync bugs (BUG 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10). Optimized DB writes, fixed polling loops, and ensured data safety on sign-out/background.

errors_encountered.error: UI/Service Desync: UI news list didn't update when Service refreshed items in continuous loop
errors_encountered.solution: Added continuousNewsItems to NewsReaderState and observed it in MainViewModel to update UI state

errors_encountered.error: Immediate Duplicate Reading: News items repeated because they weren't marked as read between rounds
errors_encountered.solution: Added explicit readNewsDao.markAsRead() call after each item summarization in the batch loop

decisions_made.decision: Use currentCoroutineContext().isActive for cancellation check in suspend functions
decisions_made.reason: Plain suspend functions don't have access to CoroutineScope.isActive; this ensures clean interruption.
Standard Android long-press experience, supplemented with haptic and Toast feedback for clarity.
